content: Planned action: keep the current per-tile split memory and size memory unchanged, then patch `app/widgets/page_matrix.py` so duo icons render larger and numbers disappear when a site or split is present in the top-bar buttons.

Planned action: verify the real current state of Topbrutus/MonDeuxiemeProjet after the user clarified the project is no longer the daily-issue-summary tool but the new project for parallel GPT-to-GPT talk. Inspect repo content before any repositioning or brain update.

Planned action: initialize Topbrutus/MonDeuxiemeProjet around its real goal: parallel GPT-to-GPT speak. Create a clean first scaffold with a project README, backlog, architecture note, gitignore, and starter Python modules for session, message bus, and orchestrator behavior.

Result: Topbrutus/MonDeuxiemeProjet now has a real scaffold aligned with the new goal of parallel GPT-to-GPT communication. Added a rewritten README, PROJECT-BACKLOG.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, .gitignore, and starter Python modules for session, message bus, orchestrator, and runnable demo entrypoint.

Planned action: make the current demo actually runnable and improve the transcript output. Fix the current `python src/main.py` run path so it does not depend on package-relative imports, then update orchestration and demo output for clear turn-based parallel speaking.

Result: the demo entrypoint is now runnable with `python src/main.py` and the transcript is cleaner. Updated src/main.py to support direct execution, updated src/orchestrator.py to show participants, waves, and synthesis, and added a run command to README.md.
